description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted utility sink with a deep basin and a slightly beveled rim. The sink is made of a beige or off-white ceramic or composite material, showing visible stains and signs of wear, suggesting heavy use in an urban or industrial setting. It features a single, curved metal faucet with two separate knobs for hot and cold water, colored blue and red respectively. The drain is centrally located at the bottom of the basin, and there is no visible overflow hole. The back panel is raised to protect the wall from splashes, and the underside is open, exposing the mounting structure. The overall appearance is utilitarian, functional, and somewhat aged.
description: A rectangular, wall-mounted utility sink with a deep, stained basin, dual-knob faucet, and a raised back panel. The surface is worn and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the basin, the curved faucet, and the blue cold water knob.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual knobs (blue and red), the central drain, and the full width of the basin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the red hot water knob visible and clear signs of staining inside the basin.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the raised back panel and the mounting structure, with the faucet extending forward.
